gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/108)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/108)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَ يُجْزِئُ عَنِّي أَنْ أَقْرَأَ فِي الْفَرِيضَةِ فَاتِحَةَ الْكِتَابِ وَحْدَهَا إِذَا كُنْتُ مُسْتَعْجِلًا أَوْ أَعْجَلَنِي شَيْ‏ءٌ فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ .

en.hubeali: Abu Dawood, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ibn Muskan, from Hasan Al Sayqal who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘Would it suffice from me if I were to recite during the Obligatory (Salāt), the Opening of the Book (Chapter 1) only when I was in haste or something was hastening me?’ So heasws said: ‘There is no problem’.
en.sarwar: 7. Abu Dawud has narrated from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from Muhammad ibn Sinan from ibn Muskan from Hassan al-Sayqaf who has said the foiiowing: “I once asked abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘Is it sufficient for me to read just al-Fatihah in an obligatory Salah (prayer) if I am in a hurry or something causes me to move quickly?’ He (the Imam) replied, ’It is not harmful.’”
